mapper.sql: id, group_name, core_expression, synonyms, usage_note, difficulty, skill_tags, topic_tags, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select:
SELECT pg.*, sr.status AS study_status FROM ielts_paraphrase_groups pg LEFT JOIN ielts_study_records sr ON sr.content_type = 'PARAPHRASE' AND sr.content_id = pg.id
ORDER BY pg.created_at DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ielts_paraphrase_groups pg LEFT JOIN ielts_study_records sr ON sr.content_type = 'PARAPHRASE' AND sr.content_id = pg.id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ielts_paraphrase_groups (id, group_name, core_expression, synonyms, usage_note, difficulty, skill_tags, topic_tags, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{id,jdbcType=OTHER}, #{groupName}, #{coreExpression}, #{synonyms}, #{usageNote}, #{difficulty}, #{skillTags}, #{topicTags}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE ielts_paraphrase_groups SET group_name = #{groupName}, core_expression = #{coreExpression}, synonyms = #{synonyms}, usage_note = #{usageNote}, difficulty = #{difficulty}, skill_tags = #{skillTags}, topic_tags = #{topicTags}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id,jdbcType=OTHER}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO ielts_paraphrase_groups (id, group_name, core_expression, synonyms, usage_note, difficulty, skill_tags, topic_tags, created_at, updated_at) VALUES
(#{g.id,jdbcType=OTHER}, #{g.groupName}, #{g.coreExpression}, #{g.synonyms}, #{g.usageNote}, #{g.difficulty}, #{g.skillTags}, #{g.topicTags}, #{g.createdAt}, #{g.updatedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT pg.* FROM ielts_paraphrase_groups pg WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM ielts_study_records sr WHERE sr.content_type = 'PARAPHRASE' AND sr.content_id = pg.id ) ORDER BY pg.difficulty, pg.id LIMIT #{limit}
